overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player character moves from an elevated pedestrian walkway down to street level beneath massive highway overpasses, then along sidewalks lined with vending machines and graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with palm trees overlooking highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated walkway lined with palm trees and concrete benches

entered.detail: tall palm trees in planters lining the left side of the walkway
rectangular concrete benches where pedestrians are seated
black metal safety railing along the right edge of the elevated walkway
massive concrete highway structure visible in the foggy distance
building with illuminated windows and signage visible through the fog
tall street lamp casting light through the fog
large rectangular planters housing the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night atop an elevated pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees and concrete benches. The camera moves forward along the tiled path, with a metal railing on the right overlooking a highway below. A few pedestrians sit on benches to the left, while the glow of distant neon buildings pierces through the fog ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street beneath massive highway overpass

events.description: descends from elevated walkway to street level beneath the highway overpass
black vehicle drives past on the foggy street

agents.ego_description: walking along the asphalt street under the highway overpass, navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: black car driving down the foggy street beneath the overpass

entered.detail: wet asphalt street surface reflecting the street lights
massive concrete support pillar for the highway overpass
dark building facade with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to street level, transitioning from the elevated walkway to the asphalt road beneath a massive highway overpass. The environment opens up to a wide street with concrete support pillars and wet pavement reflecting artificial lights. A black vehicle drives past in the fog, and the highway structure now looms overhead to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with neon-lit skyscrapers and digital billboards

events.description: camera pans right to view towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage
camera turns back to face forward along the street

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering neon-lit buildings and digital billboards before continuing

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with grid-patterned illuminated windows
large glowing digital advertisement screen on building facade
orange and white striped construction barriers
orange metal railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal a canyon of towering skyscrapers adorned with digital billboards and neon lights piercing through the fog. After observing the vertical architecture, the view returns to street level showing construction barriers and the continuing highway overpass structure to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with vending machines and storefronts under overpass

events.description: turns onto sidewalk passing red vending machines and graffiti-covered walls
approaching a brightly lit storefront with green neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk past pedestrians and vending machines toward a lit storefront

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing standing near the red vending machine
pedestrian with red hair walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright red vending machine with illuminated product display
concrete wall covered in black and white graffiti art
gray concrete pavement with yellow painted lines
storefront with bright green neon lights and metal security gates

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls and a prominent red vending machine. The camera moves past various pedestrians, including a person in white near the vending machine and another with red hair walking ahead. The segment ends as the camera approaches a brightly lit storefront with green neon signage tucked under the highway overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a foggy, elevated pedestrian walkway down into the neon-drenched depths of a futuristic street. It begins by moving along a tiled path lined with palm trees and concrete benches, where the glow of distant buildings pierces through a thick haze. As the camera descends from the walkway to the asphalt below, the environment opens into a wide street beneath a massive highway overpass, with wet pavement reflecting the artificial lights as a black vehicle passes through the fog. The view then pans upward to reveal a canyon of towering skyscrapers and digital billboards before returning to street level to pass construction barriers and the looming concrete pillars. Finally, the scene shifts toward a narrower sidewalk characterized by graffiti-covered walls and a red vending machine, moving past various pedestrians toward a brightly lit storefront with green neon signage.
